steps:
1. Target = £8, raised = £2.40.
2. Percentage raised = (raised / target) × 100 = (2.40 / 8) × 100 = 0.3 × 100 = 30%.
3. Amount still needed = target - raised = £8 - £2.40 = £5.60.
4. Fraction of target still needed = (5.60 / 8) = 56/80 = simplify by 8: 7/10.
5. Check options: A says 30% raised, 7/10 still needed — matches exactly.
6. Verify others: B says 24% raised — wrong; C says 30% raised but 3/4 still needed — 3/4 = 0.75 ≠ 0.7; D says 32% raised — wrong; E says 25% raised — wrong.
7. Only A matches both parts correctly.
